title: citrus × aurantium var. conifera
intro: Citrus × aurantium var. conifera, commonly known as bitter orange or sour orange, is a plant species within the Rutaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium var. conifera include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in weight loss, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Citrus × aurantium var. conifera include essential oils, teas, and extracts, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and as a natural remedy for various ailments.
